--- 
title: "provincial NSYT production process and assessment"
author: "author"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: bookdown::gitbook
documentclass: book
---

# Prerequisites

This is the documentation of how provincial natural stand yield table (NSYT) was generated and the assessments of the product.

```{r eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
install.packages("bookdown")
# or the development version
# devtools::install_github("rstudio/bookdown")

##to render the book
bookdown::render_book('bookdown', 'all')
```
